mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_REVIEW WHERE br_loca = #{br_loca}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT br_idx, br_loan_id, SUBSTR(br_web_id, 1, 3) || LPAD('*', LENGTH(br_web_id)-3, '*') AS br_web_id, SUBSTR(br_name, 1, 1) || LPAD('*', LENGTH(br_name)-1, '*') AS br_name, br_content, br_score, br_loca, br_ctrlno, add_date, mod_date FROM BOOK_REVIEW WHERE br_ctrlno = #{br_ctrlno} ORDER BY br_idx DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK_REVIEW WHERE br_loan_id = #{br_loan_id} AND br_ctrlno = #{br_ctrlno}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(br_idx), 0) + 1 FROM BOOK_REVIEW
INSERT INTO BOOK_REVIEW ( br_idx, br_loan_id, br_web_id, br_name, br_content, br_score, br_loca, br_ctrlno, add_date ) VALUES ( #{br_idx}, #{br_loan_id}, #{br_web_id}, #{br_name}, #{br_content}, #{br_score}, #{br_loca}, #{br_ctrlno}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK_REVIEW SET br_content = #{br_content}, br_score = #{br_score}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE br_idx = #{br_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT br_idx, br_loan_id, br_web_id, br_content, br_score, br_loca, br_ctrlno, add_date, mod_date FROM BOOK_REVIEW WHERE br_loan_id = #{br_loan_id}
SELECT br_idx, br_loan_id, br_web_id, br_content, br_score, br_loca, br_ctrlno, add_date, mod_date FROM BOOK_REVIEW WHERE br_idx = #{br_idx}
